title: Venous thromboembolism in people  with invasive PVL-SA infections
body: "This rapid systematic review identified and summarised evidence on the occurrence of venous thromboembolism in hospital inpatients with invasive Panton–Valentine Leukocidin Staphylococcus aureus (PVL-SA) infections.  This rapid systematic review searched for research published up to 25 November 2024. Nineteen studies were included: 4 cohort studies, 3 case series, and 12 case reports. "
